feature1_default_configuration.json.description: Reports the complete built-in configuration used when no caller overrides are supplied.

cases.expected_output:
directive=wave
color=currentColor
initialOpacity=0.2
finalOpacity=0.1
duration=0.4
dissolveDuration=0.15
easing=ease-out
cancellationPeriod=75
trigger=auto
tagName=div
disabled=false
respectDisabledAttribute=true
stopPropagation=false

feature2_trigger_modes.json.description: Classifies activation trigger settings as automatic behavior, boolean behavior, or a named identifier that requires a matching activator.

feature3_boundary_marker.json.description: Marks an effect boundary so ordinary activation uses a generic marker and named activation stores the requested identifier.

feature4_relative_pointer.json.description: Converts a page pointer position into coordinates relative to the decorated element's top-left corner, preserving negative coordinates outside the element.

feature5_coverage_radius.json.description: Calculates the ripple radius needed for an origin point to reach the farthest corner of an element rectangle.

feature6_container_element.json.description: Creates the clipping container for the visual effect using the requested tag and fixed positioning and masking styles.

feature7_wave_element.json.description: Creates the animated circular visual element at the requested origin and size, applying the supplied visual timing options as inline styles.

feature8_runtime_family.json.description: Detects whether the host UI runtime uses the modern or legacy plugin shape and reports the lifecycle phase names required by that runtime.
